name: iconify-json-nucleo-codegen
description: Render Nucleo React icon packages into Iconify icon sets on the consumer's machine

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts ./src/cli.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --packages external && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && chmod +x ./dist/cli.js && bun run verify:dist
scripts.verify:dist: node --input-type=module -e "import('./dist/index.js').then((m) => { if (typeof m.buildFamily !== 'function' || !Array.isArray(m.FAMILIES)) { throw new Error('built dist/index.js is missing expected exports'); } })"

author: Jonathan Russ
